title: chrysanthemum mucronulatum
intro: Chrysanthemum mucronulatum, also known as Korean chrysanthemum or fall chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to East Asia. This herb has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum mucronulatum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and fatigue, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
